channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Melania Trump shares the spotlight with a robot at an education and technology event
item.description: The robot accompanied the first lady to the White House East Room for the final day of a summit she had convened with counterparts from around the world through her Fostering the Future Together global initiative.
item.content:encoded:
The robot accompanied the first lady to the White House East Room for the final day of a summit she had convened with counterparts from around the world through her Fostering the Future Together global initiative.

(Image credit: Jacquelyn Martin)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: UN calls for reparations to remedy the 'historical wrongs' of trafficking enslaved Africans
item.description: The U.N. General Assembly adopted a resolution declaring the trafficking of enslaved Africans "the gravest crime against humanity" and calling for reparations.
item.content:encoded:
The U.N. General Assembly adopted a resolution declaring the trafficking of enslaved Africans "the gravest crime against humanity" and calling for reparations.

(Image credit: Pamela Smith)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: War with Iran disrupts fertilizer exports as U.S. farmers prepare for planting season
item.description: Gulf states are major fertilizer producers, and the war with Iran has triggered a 25% price hike just as struggling U.S. farmers are planting corn.
item.content:encoded:
Gulf states are major fertilizer producers, and the war with Iran has triggered a 25% price hike just as struggling U.S. farmers are planting corn.

(Image credit: Frank Morris)
item.dc:creator: Frank Morris

item.title: Doctors worry about FDA scrutiny of RSV shots to protect babies
item.description: The antibody shots are about 80% effective at preventing babies from ending up in intensive care because of RSV. The drugmakers behind them maintain they're safe.
item.content:encoded:
The antibody shots are about 80% effective at preventing babies from ending up in intensive care because of RSV. The drugmakers behind them maintain they're safe.

(Image credit: AP)

item.title: Travelers are facing the longest TSA wait times in history
item.description: Wait times are exceeding four hours at some major airports, leading TSA officers to call out at rates of 40 to 50%, according to TSA Deputy Administrator Ha Nguyen McNeill.
item.content:encoded:
Wait times are exceeding four hours at some major airports, leading TSA officers to call out at rates of 40 to 50%, according to TSA Deputy Administrator Ha Nguyen McNeill.

(Image credit: Ryan Murphy)
item.dc:creator: Ayana Archie

item.title: Stephen Colbert's next epic quest? Writing a new 'Lord of the Rings' movie
item.description: The film will focus on chapters in J.R.R. Tolkien's The Fellowship of the Ring that were left out of the first movie in the trilogy.
item.content:encoded:
The film will focus on chapters in J.R.R. Tolkien's The Fellowship of the Ring that were left out of the first movie in the trilogy.

(Image credit: Angela Weiss)
item.dc:creator: Ivy Buck

item.title: Greetings from Turkey's border with Iran, where Iranians let loose on the dance floor
item.description: Iranians escaping hardship and war are shaking it off to Persian, Arabic and Turkish tunes in this disco in eastern Turkey.
item.content:encoded: Iranians escaping hardship and war are shaking it off to Persian, Arabic and Turkish tunes in this disco in eastern Turkey.
item.dc:creator: Emily Feng

item.title: Jury finds Meta and Google negligent in social media harms trial
item.description: The jury ordered the companies to pay $6 million in damages over defective design. The landmark verdict may influence the outcome of 2,000 other pending lawsuits.
item.content:encoded:
The jury ordered the companies to pay $6 million in damages over defective design. The landmark verdict may influence the outcome of 2,000 other pending lawsuits.

(Image credit: Frederic J. Brown)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn

item.title: For the first time in more than 1,400 years, Church of England gets a woman leader
item.description: A new archbishop of Canterbury has been installed in a historic ceremony. Sarah Mullally is the 106th person to hold the job, and the first woman.
item.content:encoded:
A new archbishop of Canterbury has been installed in a historic ceremony. Sarah Mullally is the 106th person to hold the job, and the first woman.

(Image credit: Alastair Grant)
item.dc:creator: Robbie Griffiths

item.title: Savannah Guthrie's first interview since mother Nancy vanished: 'I imagine her terror'
item.description: Nearly two months after Nancy Guthrie disappeared, her daughter Savannah discusses the toll on her family in an emotional interview with her Today show colleague Hoda Kotb.
item.content:encoded:
Nearly two months after Nancy Guthrie disappeared, her daughter Savannah discusses the toll on her family in an emotional interview with her Today show colleague Hoda Kotb.

(Image credit: Rebecca Noble)
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell
